option.name: originalContent
option.value:
server: port: 5000
spring: application: name: gateway-server
cloud: gateway: discovery: locator: enabled: true
routes:
- id: BOOKING-SERVICE uri: lb://BOOKING-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/bookings/**
- id: PAYMENT-SERVICE uri: lb://PAYMENT-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/payments/**
- id: CATEGORY-SERVICE uri: lb://CATEGORY-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/categories/**
- id: SALON-SERVICE uri: lb://SALON-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/salons/**
- id: SERVICE-OFFERING uri: lb://SERVICE-OFFERING predicates: - Path=/api/service-offering/**
- id: USER-SERVICE uri: lb://USER-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/auth/**
- id: ADMIN-USER-SERVICE uri: lb://USER-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/admin/users/**
- id: USER-API-SERVICE uri: lb://USER-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/users/**
- id: USER-OLD-SERVICE uri: lb://USER-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/users/**
eureka: instance: prefer-ip-address: true
client: fetch-registry: true register-with-eureka: true
service-url: defaultZone: http://localhost:8070/eureka/

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
server: port: 5000
spring: application: name: gateway-server
cloud: gateway: discovery: locator: enabled: true
routes:
- id: BOOKING-SERVICE uri: lb://BOOKING-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/bookings/** filters: - StripPrefix=2
- id: PAYMENT-SERVICE uri: lb://PAYMENT-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/payments/** filters: - StripPrefix=2
- id: CATEGORY-SERVICE uri: lb://CATEGORY-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/categories/** filters: - StripPrefix=2
- id: SALON-SERVICE uri: lb://SALON-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/salons/** filters: - StripPrefix=2
- id: SERVICE-OFFERING uri: lb://SERVICE-OFFERING predicates: - Path=/api/service-offering/** filters: - StripPrefix=2
- id: USER-SERVICE uri: lb://USER-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/auth/** filters: - StripPrefix=1
- id: ADMIN-USER-SERVICE uri: lb://USER-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/admin/users/** filters: - StripPrefix=3
- id: USER-API-SERVICE uri: lb://USER-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/api/users/** filters: - StripPrefix=2
- id: USER-OLD-SERVICE uri: lb://USER-SERVICE predicates: - Path=/users/** filters: - StripPrefix=1
eureka: instance: prefer-ip-address: true
client: fetch-registry: true register-with-eureka: true
service-url: defaultZone: http://localhost:8070/eureka/
